verbGlossary.LOCATES: {source} provides spatial coordinates to place a quality or {target} at a specific building location
verbGlossary.PINPOINTS: {source} geometry identifies the exact element and location where {target} deficiency exists
verbGlossary.REFERENCES: Quality or {target} links back to a specific model view or element for traceability
verbGlossary.SPAWNS: A condition visible in {target} creates a new coordination issue record
verbGlossary.EXPOSES: {source}of trade models reveals design-related clashes logged as coordination issues
verbGlossary.MAPS TO: {source}is linked to a specific {target} checklist item for field verification
verbGlossary.TAGS: {source} is associated with a categorized {target} so deficiencies trace to specific assemblies
verbGlossary.ANCHORS: {source} provides the spatial and descriptive context for a field {target}
verbGlossary.INITIATES: {source} {target} starts a corrective action workflow to resolve the conflict
verbGlossary.PROMPTS: {source}of an action plan with assigned tasks and deadlines
verbGlossary.ESCALATES TO: {source} coordination issue is promoted to a formal quality or safety coordination record when unresolved
verbGlossary.ASSIGNS: {source} coordination meeting allocates specific action plan tasks to responsible parties
verbGlossary.VALIDATES: {source} data is compared to design intent to confirm or reject installation quality
verbGlossary.IDENTIFIES: As-built model comparison reveals installed conditions that require punch list items
verbGlossary.GENERATES: {source}produces a formal {target} notice for the responsible trade
verbGlossary.BENCHMARKS: {source}provides the baseline geometry for field {target} acceptance criteria
verbGlossary.FLAGS: Drone aerial imagery highlights {target} or condition requiring an observation record
verbGlossary.DOCUMENTS: {source}capture provides visual evidence attached to an environmental or commissioning {target}
verbGlossary.VERIFIES: {source}provides visual confirmation that {target} has been properly resolved
verbGlossary.SUBSTANTIATES: Construction photograph corroborates the finding described in a field observation
verbGlossary.MONITORS: Digital twin streams real-time system data used to evaluate performance test results
verbGlossary.SPECIFIES: {source} parameters define the material grades and tolerances that material test reports must verify
verbGlossary.SCOPES: {source} properties determine which elements require scheduled inspections and at what project stage
verbGlossary.INFORMS: {source} data provides the engineering parameters a third-party inspector needs for evaluation
verbGlossary.ILLUSTRATES: {source}-based drawing provides the visual reference an inspector uses to evaluate line items
verbGlossary.CORRELATES WITH: {source} density metric tracks alongside {target} density to reveal quality patterns
verbGlossary.PREDICTS: {source}rates are a leading indicator of lower downstream {target} rates
verbGlossary.INFLUENCES: {source}documentation rates on a project improve {target} pass rates through accountability
